title: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds
display_title: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds
wikitext:
[]: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Darth Plato » Mon Dec 29, 2025 9:41 pm I'm curious about how someone would take it that way. To me, I don't think it would make any sense. A subsidiary question would be---did anyone here see the rebuilds FIRST? I am just asking to see what someone's perspective would be if they did that.

[]: Re: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sat Jan 03, 2026 10:16 am I do not think that is very common, particularly because NTE borrows so much from the original series, and I feel the viewer loses a lot if they do not understand the meta references to the earlier material. That said, I did watch JO before NGE, years earlier in fact, at a time when I did not even know what Evangelion was. My stepdad rented it on Blu ray, before rentals sadly stopped being a thing.

[]: Re: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Darth Plato » Sun Jan 04, 2026 8:48 am What was that like? Were you confused when most people didn't know about Lilith in the original? Did you assume Kaworu came from the moon?

[]: Re: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Jan 04, 2026 2:05 pm Honestly, I was just a kid. I was what? 9 years old? So, the only thing I remember noticing was that there had been some kind of climate disaster in the world and that Pen Pen was funny. I also remember thinking that the first impact was the extinction of the dionosaurids, for some reason

[]: Re: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Darth Plato » Sun Jan 04, 2026 3:45 pm I think that was a common impression people had from the original series too. To be honest, if there is a fan consensus *or near consensus* on the First Impact, I don't even know what it is.

[]: Re: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Wed Jan 07, 2026 10:17 am Darth Plato wrote: I think that was a common impression people had from the original series too. To be honest, if there is a fan consensus *or near consensus* on the First Impact, I don't even know what it is.

[]: Re: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sat Jan 10, 2026 6:04 pm Yeah. You can check out some information about the First Impact on this wiki page: https://wiki.evageeks.org/First_Impact As for the dinosaurs, I'm almost certain that was something everyone believed in back then. Maybe my stepfather told me about it. I don't remember. But the idea of ​​angels versus dinosaurs is very good.

[]: Re: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Jan 19, 2026 10:31 pm Lilith's arrival on Earth created the Moon, one reason Reinis always paired with it.

[]: Re: Has anyone here watched ONLY the Rebuilds?             Quote Post by lmm34789 » Mon Feb 23, 2026 11:29 pm I actually watched the Rebuild series first, up to the 3.0, then I went back and rewatched the original anime + EOE, this was a long time ago before 3.0+1.0 was released. I actually thought Rei was the central love interest and Asuka was the random character. The first 2-3 rebuild movies focused a lot more on Rei than the OG anime did.
